# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  # Cloud Storage Bucket
  - name: my-app-storage-bucket
    type: gcp-types/storage-v1:buckets
    properties:
      name: my-app-storage-bucket-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      location: US-CENTRAL1
      storageClass: STANDARD

  # Cloud SQL Instance (PostgreSQL)
  - name: my-app-sql-instance
    type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
    properties:
      name: my-app-sql-instance-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_14
      region: us-central1
      settings:
        tier: db-f1-micro
        diskSize: 20
        diskType: PD_SSD
        backupConfiguration:
          enabled: true
          startTime: "03:00"
        ipConfiguration:
          ipv4Enabled: true
          # authorizedNetworks:
          #   - value: "0.0.0.0/0" # WARNING: For MVP/testing. Restrict in production.
        storageAutoResize: true
        storageAutoResizeLimit: 0
        availabilityType: REGIONAL # For high availability

  # Compute Engine Instance Template
  - name: my-app-instance-template
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:instanceTemplates
    properties:
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      name: my-app-instance-template-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      properties:
        machineType: e2-micro
        zone: us-central1-a
        disks:
          - deviceName: boot
            type: PERSISTENT
            boot: true
            autoDelete: true
            initializeParams:
              sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-11
              diskSizeGb: 10
        networkInterfaces:
          - network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
            accessConfigs:
              - name: External NAT
                type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        serviceAccounts:
          - email: "{{ env["project_number"] }}-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com"
            scopes:
              - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform # Broad scope for MVP
        metadata:
          items:
            - key: startup-script
              value: |
                #!/bin/bash
                sudo apt-get update
                sudo apt-get install -y nginx
                sudo systemctl start nginx
                sudo systemctl enable nginx
                echo "Hello from $(hostname)!" | sudo tee /var/www/html/index.nginx-debian.html
        tags:
          items:
            - http-server

  # Compute Engine Managed Instance Group
  - name: my-app-instance-group
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:instanceGroupManagers
    properties:
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      name: my-app-instance-group-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      zone: us-central1-a
      baseInstanceName: my-app-instance
      targetSize: 2
      instanceTemplate: $(ref:my-app-instance-template.selfLink)

  # Firewall Rule for Load Balancer Health Checks and HTTP traffic
  - name: my-app-firewall-http
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:firewalls
    properties:
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      name: my-app-firewall-http-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
      direction: INGRESS
      priority: 1000
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0 # Allow HTTP/S traffic and health checks from all IPs
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - 80
            - 443
      targetTags:
        - http-server

  # Load Balancer Components
  # 1. Health Check
  - name: my-app-health-check
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:httpHealthChecks
    properties:
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      name: my-app-health-check-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      requestPath: /
      port: 80

  # 2. Backend Service
  - name: my-app-backend-service
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:backendServices
    properties:
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      name: my-app-backend-service-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      portName: http
      protocol: HTTP
      timeoutSec: 30
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref:my-app-health-check.selfLink)
      backends:
        - group: $(ref:my-app-instance-group.instanceGroup)

  # 3. URL Map
  - name: my-app-url-map
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:urlMaps
    properties:
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      name: my-app-url-map-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      defaultService: $(ref:my-app-backend-service.selfLink)

  # 4. Target HTTP Proxy
  - name: my-app-http-proxy
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:targetHttpProxies
    properties:
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      name: my-app-http-proxy-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      urlMap: $(ref:my-app-url-map.selfLink)

  # 5. Global Forwarding Rule (for HTTP)
  - name: my-app-forwarding-rule-http
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:globalForwardingRules
    properties:
      project: {{ env["project"] }}
      name: my-app-forwarding-rule-http-{{ env["deployment"] }}
      portRange: "80"
      target: $(ref:my-app-http-proxy.selfLink)

outputs:
  - name: bucketUrl
    value: $(ref:my-app-storage-bucket.url)
  - name: sqlConnectionName
    value: $(ref:my-app-sql-instance.connectionName)
  - name: sqlPublicIpAddress
    value: $(ref:my-app-sql-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
  - name: loadBalancerIp
    value: $(ref:my-app-forwarding-rule-http.IPAddress)
